# timezonemapper

import "github.com/zsefvlol/timezonemapper"

## Index

- [func LatLngToTimezoneString\(lat, lng float64\) string](<#LatLngToTimezoneString>)

<a name="LatLngToTimezoneString"></a>

## func [LatLngToTimezoneString](<https://github.com/zsefvlol/timezonemapper/blob/master/timezonemapper.go#L14>)

```go
func LatLngToTimezoneString(lat, lng float64) string
```

LatLngToTimezoneString converts from GPS coordinate latitude/longitude to timezone string, for example: "Asia/Shanghai". Invalid or unknown timezone will fall back to empty string "". In that case, if you get location by time.LoadLocation\(timezone\), an UTC location will be returned.

# example

```go
import "github.com/zsefvlol/timezonemapper/example"
```
